overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a stealth action game showing a bald protagonist in a suit navigating a dimly lit, abandoned institutional building. The character moves from a red-lit room through office spaces into a fluorescent-lit waiting area with scattered debris and seated NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit back room with emergency red lighting

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the cluttered room toward the back

notable_agents.action: standing still in blue medical scrubs near the shelving unit

entered.detail: large window emitting red emergency light from outside
tall metal rack with multiple shelves against the wall
low wooden cabinet with items on top
stacked boxes on the floor near the wall

segments.scene_description: The protagonist navigates a narrow, dimly lit room with wooden floors and red emergency lighting visible through the windows. A person in blue scrubs stands near a metal shelving unit as the character moves forward through the cluttered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned office corridor with scattered furniture

events.description: transitioning from red emergency lighting to cool fluorescent ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: moving through the office area past desks and filing cabinets

entered.detail: wooden desk with old CRT monitor and papers
tall metal filing cabinet with drawers
open doorway leading to the next room
long fluorescent light fixture on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a transitional office space with carpeted flooring and mixed lighting. Old computer monitors sit on wooden desks while fluorescent tubes illuminate the path toward an arched doorway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waiting area with benches and scattered debris

events.description: entering larger waiting area with seated individuals visible on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past seated individuals in the dilapidated waiting room

notable_agents.action: seated on bench wearing light blue clothing, facing away from camera

entered.detail: wooden bench with people seated on it
white papers and debris scattered across the carpeted floor
dark doorway at the far end of the waiting area

segments.scene_description: The protagonist enters a larger waiting area illuminated by fluorescent ceiling lights. Several people sit on a wooden bench to the left while papers litter the carpeted floor. The space opens up toward a distant doorway as the character continues moving forward through the abandoned facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit institutional building that transitions from a red-hued emergency zone into a brightly lit, abandoned waiting area. It begins in a narrow room with wooden floors and red emergency lighting, moving past a person in blue scrubs and metal shelving. As the character advances, the scene shifts into a transitional office space where the red glow fades, replaced by fluorescent tubes illuminating wooden desks and old computer monitors. The camera then glides through an arched doorway, opening into a larger waiting area filled with scattered papers and people seated on a wooden bench. Finally, the space expands further under harsh ceiling lights as the character continues moving forward toward a distant doorway.
